meta.name: Sub-20 5K
meta.subtitle: Break the 20-minute barrier
meta.description: Sub-20 requires specific speed work: short intervals, controlled tempo runs, and peak form on race day. This plan assumes you already run sub-23.

weeks.title: Base Building — Week 1
weeks.note: Week 1: Build your aerobic base. Every run should feel comfortable — you're conditioning your body to handle more.

sessions.det: 7km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
4km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
7km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
7km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
14km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Base Building — Week 2
weeks.note: Week 2: Build your aerobic base. Every run should feel comfortable — you're conditioning your body to handle more.

sessions.det: 8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
4km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
15km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
16km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Base Building — Week 4
weeks.note: Week 4: Build your aerobic base. Every run should feel comfortable — you're conditioning your body to handle more.

sessions.det: 6km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
4km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
6km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
6km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
11km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 5
weeks.note: Week 5: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 7km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
5km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
6km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
15km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 6
weeks.note: Week 6: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 8km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
5km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
6km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
16km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

sessions.det: 8km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.

9km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
6km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
17km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Build Phase — Week 8
weeks.note: Week 8: Quality over quantity. The interval and tempo sessions are where fitness is made. Protect your sleep this week.

sessions.det: 6km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
4km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
8km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
5km easy then 4 × 100m strides · Start slow, build to 90% in the final 30m of each stride.
13km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

weeks.title: Peak Training — Week 9
weeks.note: Week 9: Peak training week. This is hard — it's meant to be. Trust the process and execute each session.

sessions.det: 8km tempo · 4:45–5:05/km · Comfortably hard. You can speak in short sentences only.
6km very easy · 6:30–7:00/km · Shake out the legs. Slower than you think you need.
7km total · 400m reps at 5K race pace · Full recovery between reps. Quality over quantity.
10km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
17km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.

10km easy · 5:50–6:20/km · Conversational pace. If you can't hold a conversation, you're going too fast.
17km long · 6:00–6:30/km · Easy, conversational effort throughout. The longest run of your week.
